sentence: 老师给我们列出了一份推荐书目。
pinyin: Lǎoshī gěi wǒmen lièchū le yī fèn tuījiàn shūmù.
english: The teacher gave us a list of recommended books.

sentence: 他卸任后回到了家乡生活。
pinyin: Tā xièrèn hòu huí dào le jiāxiāng shēnghuó.
english: After leaving office, he returned to his hometown to live.

sentence: 她把书本整齐地放在书架上。
pinyin: Tā bǎ shūběn zhěngqí de fàng zài shūjià shàng.
english: She neatly arranged the books on the bookshelf.

sentence: 彩虹展示了可见光的光谱。
pinyin: Cǎihóng zhǎnshì le kějiànguāng de guāngpǔ.
english: A rainbow displays the spectrum of visible light.

sentence: 他们的恋情是从大学开始的。
pinyin: Tāmen de liànqíng shì cóng dàxué kāishǐ de.
english: Their romance started back in college.
